title: Notch Apple Title
description: Changes the default Minecraft title to the title for the Notch Apple modpack.
body:
Changes the default Minecraft title to the Notch Apple title. 

Title will now read:

MINECRAFT

Notch Apple

Super simple resource pack that only makes the one change. Purely cosmetic for use with the [NOTCH APPLE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/notch-apple-server) modpack or on it's own.
